def positive_subprocess_pipe_without_communicate_for_large_output():
    rule_id = "subprocess_pipe_without_communicate_for_large_output"
    family = "boundaries"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "subprocess.Popen with PIPE but .communicate() not called, risking deadlock on large output."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
